title: Suncatcher for Brazil
goal: Enable customers at Guarulhos Brazil to virtually try on selected sunglasses using the Mirrar tool, enhancing the shopping experience and driving engagement with featured products.
description: mirrAr Virtual Try-On will be integrated into our platform, allowing users to visualize how selected sunglasses look on them, directly from the product detail page. Only specific SKUs, pre-identified through unique attributes in Akeneo, will be compatible with this feature. The backend utilizes these Akeneo attributes to dynamically display the virtual try-on option only for eligible products. With this tool, customers can either upload an image from their gallery or use their device's camera to try on the sunglasses in real-time.
